verses.text: God gives the plan: march, blow trumpets, and the wall shall fall. The plan. Victory is by faith, not force.
God gives the plan: march, blow trumpets, and the wall shall fall. The plan. Victory is by faith, not force.
God gives the plan: march, blow trumpets, and the wall shall fall. The plan. Victory is by faith, not force.
God gives the plan: march, blow trumpets, and the wall shall fall. The plan. Victory is by faith, not force.
God gives the plan: march, blow trumpets, and the wall shall fall. The plan. Victory is by faith, not force.
Joshua orders the priests and armed men to go before the ark. Ordered. They obey the strange command.
Joshua orders the priests and armed men to go before the ark. Ordered. They obey the strange command.
They compass the city once each day for six days in silence. March. Faith waits on God's time.
They compass the city once each day for six days in silence. March. Faith waits on God's time.
They compass the city once each day for six days in silence. March. Faith waits on God's time.
They compass the city once each day for six days in silence. March. Faith waits on God's time.
They do so for six days together. Daily. Patience is tested.
They do so for six days together. Daily. Patience is tested.
They do so for six days together. Daily. Patience is tested.
On the seventh day they compass it seven times; Joshua says, 'Shout.' Shout. The moment comes.
On the seventh day they compass it seven times; Joshua says, 'Shout.' Shout. The moment comes.
The city is accursed; only Rahab is spared; touch not the spoil. Devoted. The first city is wholly God's.
The city is accursed; only Rahab is spared; touch not the spoil. Devoted. The first city is wholly God's.
The city is accursed; only Rahab is spared; touch not the spoil. Devoted. The first city is wholly God's.
The wall falls flat; they take the city. Fallen. Faith brings down the walls.
The wall falls flat; they take the city. Fallen. Faith brings down the walls.
Rahab and her house are saved, as the spies promised. Saved. Faith keeps its reward.
Rahab and her house are saved, as the spies promised. Saved. Faith keeps its reward.
Rahab and her house are saved, as the spies promised. Saved. Faith keeps its reward.
Rahab and her house are saved, as the spies promised. Saved. Faith keeps its reward.
Joshua curses him who rebuilds Jericho; his fame spreads. The curse. God's word stands.
Joshua curses him who rebuilds Jericho; his fame spreads. The curse. God's word stands.
